title: Recipe For An Orchestra Leader:
content:
Four hundred and twenty-two movements -
        Emanuel, Swedish and Swiss -
     It's a wonder the hand can keep playing,
        You'd think they'd die laughing at this!

        - Life.
meaning:
"Recipe For An Orchestra Leader:" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
